# `csharp-dapper`

Generates C# code for .NET projects using [Dapper](https://github.com/DapperLib/Dapper) as the micro-ORM.

## Install

```bash
daxonne add csharp-dapper
```

## Generated files (per table)

| Template | Output filename | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dto.hbs` | `{Table}Dto.cs` | Immutable C# `record` |
| `repository.hbs` | `{Table}Repository.cs` | Dapper repository with CRUD methods |

## Example — `CustomerDto.cs`

```csharp
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

public record CustomerDto(
    long Id,
    string FirstName,
    string LastName,
    string? Email,
    decimal Balance,
    DateOnly JoinedAt
);
```

- Nullable columns → `type?` (e.g. `string?`)
- `NUMBER(10)` → `long`, `NUMBER(12,2)` → `decimal`, `DATE` → `DateOnly`

## Example — `CustomerRepository.cs`

```csharp
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

using System.Data;
using Dapper;

public class CustomerRepository
{
    private readonly IDbConnection _db;

    public CustomerRepository(IDbConnection db) => _db = db;

    public async Task<IEnumerable<CustomerDto>> GetAllAsync()
    {
        const string sql = @"SELECT ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, BALANCE, JOINED_AT FROM CUSTOMER";
        return await _db.QueryAsync<CustomerDto>(sql);
    }

    public async Task<CustomerDto?> GetByIdAsync(long id)
    {
        const string sql = @"SELECT ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, BALANCE, JOINED_AT FROM CUSTOMER WHERE ID = :id";
        return await _db.QueryFirstOrDefaultAsync<CustomerDto>(sql, new { id });
    }

    public async Task<int> InsertAsync(CustomerDto dto)
    {
        const string sql = @"INSERT INTO CUSTOMER (ID, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, EMAIL, BALANCE, JOINED_AT) VALUES (:Id, :FirstName, :LastName, :Email, :Balance, :JoinedAt)";
        return await _db.ExecuteAsync(sql, dto);
    }

    public async Task<int> DeleteAsync(long id)
    {
        const string sql = @"DELETE FROM CUSTOMER WHERE ID = :id";
        return await _db.ExecuteAsync(sql, new { id });
    }
}
```

## Type mapping

| Internal type | C# type |
|---|---|
| `string` | `string` |
| `int` | `int` |
| `long` | `long` |
| `decimal` | `decimal` |
| `bool` | `bool` |
| `date` | `DateOnly` |
| `datetime` | `DateTime` |
| `bytes` | `byte[]` |
| `uuid` | `Guid` |
